title: Section 9
content: 1* * * Every Director of the said Association may be removed by a general meeting of the proprietors, and 2* * * every future Director of the said Association shall be elected by such a general meeting
footnote: 1. The words “And it is hereby enacted, that” omitted by Act 12 of 1891, s. 2 and Sch. I. 2. The word “that” omitted by s. 2 and Sch. I, ibid.
